payment.title: Payment
payment.stripe_instructions: Click the button below to complete your payment securely via Stripe.
payment.success.thank_you: Thank you for your payment. Your ticket has been confirmed.
payment.success.email_notice: Your ticket will be sent from {fromEmail} — please check your Junk/Spam folder.
payment.success.view_ticket: Click here to view your ticket
payment.success.view_tickets: Click here to view your tickets
payment.success.redirect_link: Click here if you are not redirected
payment.cancel.title: Payment Cancelled
payment.cancel.heading: Payment Cancelled
payment.cancel.message: Your payment was cancelled. Your ticket reservation has been removed.
payment.error.title: Payment Error
payment.error.heading: Payment Error
payment.popup.title: Complete Payment
payment.popup.instructions: Payment is processed in a new window.
payment.popup.waiting: Completing payment in the other window...
payment.popup.window_hint: Click here if the payment window didn't open
